title: HOME ENERGY SCORE - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF PLANNING AND SUSTAINABILITY HOME ENERGY SCORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on the City of Portland's requirement that sellers of most single-family homes obtain and disclose a home energy score at the time of sale. Mobile, manufactured, floating, and multi-family complexes with stacked units are not included in the requirements. Individual homeowners may qualify for an exemption under certain circumstances, including but not limited to foreclosure, condemned or uninhabitable properties, and undue hardship. The Home Energy Score measures a home's energy efficiency based on an on-site evaluation of its physical characteristics. To provide a consistent comparison for home shoppers, it does not measure the actual energy usage of its current occupants. 1810 SW 5th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 278-5347 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 278-5347 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None for information; cost of Home Energy Assessment varies. Visit website for list of authorized Home Energy Assessors. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Government Information Services * Energy Conservation Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - INCREASED GARBAGE SERVICE PROGRAM UTILITIES - GARBAGE BILL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF PLANNING AND SUSTAINABILITY
